title: Simple Diamond Economy Plugin
description: Use /diamonds to withdraw or deposit diamonds into your bank
body:
# Simple Diamond Economy
Use /diamonds <withdraw|deposit> to convert them into coins and back.

### Dependent Plugins:

- [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/)
- [PacketEvents](https://modrinth.com/plugin/packetevents)
- Any Ecomony Plugin (for example [Essentials](https://modrinth.com/plugin/essentialsx) or [BetterEconomy](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/bettereconomy.96690/))

The sidebar you can see in the gallery is included, but you can disable it in the config.yml file.


<details>
<summary>Example of the config.yml</summary>


```
sidebar-enabled: true
sidebar-updates: 10    # in ticks
items:
  diamond: 100
  diamond_block: 900
# you can put in here anything from netherite_ingot to rabbit_hide to serve as a currency and specify their value in coins
```


</details>
